1.1.voiceAnswer: It is a two-month full-time internship at Vicharanashala Lab, IIT Ropar. You work on a real open-source project under a mentor after a short training phase.

1.2.voiceAnswer: VINS means Vicharanashala Internship. It is the online programme for selected candidates, with real open-source work, mentorship, no fee, and no stipend.

1.3.voiceAnswer: VINS has Bronze training, Silver project work, Gold recognition for strong features, and Platinum as an invitation to visit the lab later.

1.4.voiceAnswer: The internship is for currently enrolled students. Already graduated candidates are not eligible for this cycle unless they re-enrol later.

1.6.voiceAnswer: Leave is not permitted. If you are attending classes or exams during the internship, you may need to join a later batch.

2.1.voiceAnswer: You can start anytime in 2026, but the internship must finish by 31 December 2026. Starting earlier is strongly recommended.

2.2.voiceAnswer: The internship is planned for two months, with up to one month of grace, but everything must finish by 31 December 2026.

aliases: start and end dates for noc
which dates should i write in noc
3.1.voiceAnswer: Use your chosen internship start date and the matching two-month end date on the NOC.

3.2.voiceAnswer: Any authorised college signatory can sign the NOC, such as HOD, Acting HOD, Principal, Dean, Director, Registrar, or Training and Placement Officer.

3.4.voiceAnswer: Use the NOC template from your dashboard unless your college requires its own format.

aliases: online course will not give noc
3.10.voiceAnswer: If an online course provider cannot issue an NOC, follow the FAQ guidance and contact the programme through the dashboard chat for your exact case.

4.1.voiceAnswer: If your result page shows the yellow VINS panel, you are selected for VINS.

4.3.voiceAnswer: The offer letter is issued after you complete the required selection and onboarding steps listed on your dashboard.

4.4.voiceAnswer: Yes, you can receive a certificate after completing the required internship work successfully.

4.8.voiceAnswer: Date changes depend on the programme rules and dashboard process. Check the FAQ answer and use dashboard chat if your case is different.

4.11.voiceAnswer: Switching from VINS online to VISE offline is not generally available after selection. Follow the dashboard guidance for your case.

5.1.voiceAnswer: You will work on a real open-source project under a Vicharanashala mentor after the training phase.

aliases: full time means how many hours
5.2.voiceAnswer: The internship is full-time. Plan for a serious daily commitment rather than a side activity.

5.3.voiceAnswer: Your mentor is assigned by the programme team according to the phase and project allocation process.

5.4.voiceAnswer: No. The internship is free and unpaid. There is no stipend.

6.1.voiceAnswer: Use the official dashboard chat and programme channels mentioned by Vicharanashala. Do not rely on unofficial groups for decisions.

8.3.voiceAnswer: The FAQ answer explains whether the completion certificate is physical or electronic. Please read the on-screen answer for the exact certificate format.

9.1.voiceAnswer: Rosetta is your internship journal. It helps you record thinking, progress, and reflection during the internship.

aliases: can i use chatgpt for rosetta
9.8.voiceAnswer: Do not use AI to fake your Rosetta entries. The journal should reflect your own thinking and work.

10.2.voiceAnswer: Follow the ViBe registration steps from the dashboard or FAQ for the AI Fundamentals course.

10.5.voiceAnswer: Zoom links are shared through the official programme flow. Check your dashboard and official messages.

10.10.voiceAnswer: Attendance and participation rules are tracked. Follow the official live-session and dashboard requirements closely.

11.1.voiceAnswer: Spurti Points are participation indicators. They are useful signals, but they are not the only basis for outcomes.

aliases: can low spurti points remove me
11.4.voiceAnswer: Low SP alone is not the full decision system, but participation requirements still matter. Read the exact FAQ answer on screen.

13.1.voiceAnswer: Use the official ViBe login route and the email connected to your internship process.

13.5.voiceAnswer: For ViBe video issues, follow the troubleshooting steps in the FAQ first. If it still fails, contact support through the official channel.

13.8.voiceAnswer: The ViBe consent and camera rules are part of the learning platform requirements. Read the exact FAQ answer before refusing access.

14.1.voiceAnswer: Team formation is part of the internship process where required. The FAQ answer gives the exact rule.

14.2.voiceAnswer: The FAQ defines the expected team size. Check the on-screen answer for the exact number.

14.3.voiceAnswer: Teams are formed through the programme process, not by random guessing. Follow the exact instructions in the FAQ and dashboard.

14.20.voiceAnswer: If a teammate is inactive or not contributing, follow the official team issue process from the FAQ and contact the programme team if needed.

15.9.voiceAnswer: A Level is a progress indicator in Spurti. The exact calculation is shown in the FAQ.

15.12.voiceAnswer: A Trophy League is a banded recognition category in Spurti. It is separate from your Level.
